title: Hooks Change Validate
description: Studio validation orchestration in `packages/ui/src/hooks/use-change-validate.ts`: one HTTP batch for **Validate All**, one single-step call for the open artifact.
context: Studio validation orchestration in `packages/ui/src/hooks/use-change-validate.ts`: one HTTP batch for **Validate All**, one single-step call for the open artifact.

rules.requirement: runChangeValidation uses server batch for Validate All
rules:
When `filename` is omitted, MUST call `port.validateChangeAll(changeName, { artifactId? })` once and flatten with `flattenBatchValidateResult`. MUST NOT loop `change.specIds` with `validateChange`.

When `filename` is set, MUST call `port.validateChange` with derived `specId` and `artifactId`.

MUST merge batch step failures, warnings, and files into `ValidateResultDto` so the shell can append lines to [`ui:bottom-panel-output`](../bottom-panel-output/spec.md) with appropriate levels; [`ui:bottom-panel-problems`](../bottom-panel-problems/spec.md) derives warn/error lines from that stream.

scenarios.requirement: runChangeValidation uses server batch for Validate All
scenarios.name: Validate All single port call

scenarios.requirement: runChangeValidation uses server batch for Validate All
scenarios.name: Inspector validate single step
when: runChangeValidation runs with a change-relative filename
then: validateChange is invoked once with derived ids

scenarios.name: flattenBatchValidateResult for shell output — primary path
when: MUST merge batch step failures, warnings, and files
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: flattenBatchValidateResult for shell output — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
